member.name: T:GroceryApp.Converters.Base64ImageSourceConverter
member.summary: Converts a string image URL (http/https, data:image base64, or local resource name) to an ImageSource. MAUI's Image control does not natively support data: URIs, so this converter handles all three cases.

member.name: T:GroceryApp.Converters.StatusToBadgeBackgroundConverter
member.summary: Returns a pastel background Color for an order-status badge.

member.name: P:GroceryApp.Models.CartItem.Stock
member.summary: Max available stock so +/- can be capped.

member.name: P:GroceryApp.Models.Order.OrderDateIST
member.summary: OrderDate converted to Indian Standard Time (IST = UTC+5:30) for display.

member.name: T:GroceryApp.Models.OrderUser
member.summary: Nested user/customer object that some backend order endpoints embed in the order response.

member.name: M:GroceryApp.Services.ApiService.ClassifyNetworkError(System.Exception)
member.summary: Returns a user-friendly message for a network exception.

member.name: M:GroceryApp.ViewModels.AdminOrderDetailViewModel.OnSelectedStatusChanged(System.String)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.ColorAnimationExtensions_Button.TextColorTo(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Button,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,Microsoft.Maui.Easing,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Animates the TextColor of an to the given color
member.param: The target color to animate the to
The time, in milliseconds, between the frames of the animation
The duration, in milliseconds, of the animation
The easing function to be used in the animation
member.returns: Value indicating if the animation completed successfully or not

The time, in milliseconds, between the frames of the animation

member.returns: Value indicating if the animation completed successfully or not
